title: Parathelypteris wuyishanica
taxonomy: Parathelypteris wuyishanica is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of deciduous, perennial fern that is native to certain regions. The classification of Parathelypteris wuyishanica places it in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. Within the family Thelypteridaceae, Parathelypteris wuyishanica is a member of the genus Parathelypteris. The classification is based on its morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics.
